name: Analytics page renders stat cards in a laid-out dashboard
description: From the dashboard, the user opens Analytics from the sidebar and sees a progress dashboard: a row of stat cards with numeric values, and either activity charts/heatmap (when enough history exists) or a clear 'not enough data yet' message — never a blank or unstyled page.

planSteps.description: Log in with valid credentials and wait for the dashboard to load
Click the Analytics link in the sidebar

Verify the Analytics page shows a heading 'Analytics' and a set of stat cards laid out as distinct bordered card cells (side-by-side in a row or grid, not stacked as plain unstyled text), each card showing a numeric value with a label such as XP, sessions, reviews, or study minutes

Verify the page also shows EITHER a consistency heatmap / bar-chart region with visible cells, OR a 'not enough data yet' guidance message — confirming the analytics view rendered its real content rather than an empty container
